title: Weekly Content Plan
content:
# Weekly Content Plan — March 3-9, 2026

## Theme: Real Estate Recruiting (kicking off the course!)

### Platform Strategy

**TikTok**
- Behind-the-scenes of recruiting process
- "What I wish I knew before joining a brokerage"
- Day in the life of a recruiting agent

**Instagram**
- Carousel: 5 signs you're ready for a brokerage change
- Stories: Q&A about recruiting
- Reels: Short tips from Day 1-2 learnings

**YouTube**
- Longer form: "How to know if a brokerage is right for you"
- Shorts: Quick recruiting tips

### This Week's Posts

| Day | Platform | Content | Status |
|-----|----------|---------|--------|
| Mon | TikTok | Day 1 recap: Why recruiting matters | - |
| Tue | IG Carousel | 5 signs to switch brokerages | - |
| Wed | TikTok | Day 2: It's not selling, it's partnership | - |
| Thu | YouTube Short | Recruiting myth vs reality | Planned |
| Fri | IG Reel | Weekend reflection + teaser | Planned |
| Sat | TikTok | Behind the scenes | - |
| Sun | YouTube | Week 1 recap | - |

### Content Ideas (Backlog)

- "100k agent" profile breakdown
- What actually matters in a comp plan
- Interview questions to ask a broker
- Common red flags in brokerages
- Success stories from recruited agents
